title: Mountain Range Sky
description: Turn the skybox into a mountain range scenery
body:
# Turn your sky into (not so) beautiful mountain-range panorama

This resoursepack was designed primarily for the [**Nuit mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit). The resourcepack's compatible with **OptiFine or OptiBoxes** but they don't support as many features so the sky will look differently (I'd also recommed disabling Sun/moon in OptiFine/OptiBoxes settings).

There are 10 skyboxes in this resourcepack all made by me (except for one) in [Blender 4.5 LTS](https://www.blender.org/): 
- Sunrise/morning skybox
- Daytime skybox
- Night skybox
- Sunset/evening skybox
- Rain/Snow variants for the skyboxes listed above
- Background for the sunrise/sunset sky
- Day background (created by another artists)

On top of that, rain has been replaced with snow (rain sounds also have been muted of course).
Custom texture for the Sun and Moon have also been created.

Special thanks to:
- [UsernameGeri](https://modrinth.com/user/UsernameGeri) - Helping me during creation of this resoursepack, collecting cloud VBDs and creating [this resoursepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/snowy-mountains-sky) which was my main inspiration
- Blender Foundation - Developing and maintaing Blender
- [AMereBagetelle](https://modrinth.com/user/AMereBagatelle) & [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese) - Nuit
- Grag Zaal & Jarod Guest (from Poli Haven) - Creating the [background for day skybox](https://polyhaven.com/a/qwantani_afternoon_puresky), distributed under CC0 license
- NASA - [CGI Moon Kit](https://svs.gsfc.nasa.gov/4720/)
